context: Tests that agent navigates to alarm detail page rather than raw metric, and understands metric filter vs native metric distinction.

checklist.name: Navigates to alarm detail page
checklist.description: Response directs to the CloudWatch alarm detail page, not to Metrics or Logs directly

checklist.name: Region in URL
checklist.description: URL includes eu-west-1 in both subdomain and region= query parameter

checklist.name: Alarm name correctly placed
checklist.description: The full alarm name appears in the URL without extra encoding of hyphens

checklist.name: Warns about metric filter vs native metric
checklist.description: Response notes that the alarm may use a Logs metric filter rather than AWS/Lambda Errors

checklist.name: Does NOT recommend navigating to AWS/Lambda Errors metric directly
checklist.description: Response does not instruct navigating to Metrics > AWS/Lambda > Errors as primary evidence

checklist.name: Mentions alarm Metric section as source of truth
checklist.description: Response states the alarm detail page shows which metric triggered the alarm
